name: libjson-perl
title: libjson-perl
description:
module for manipulating JSON-formatted data
JSON is a Perl module for manipulating data stored in the format of the same
name. JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) is a simple data serialization format
(defined in RFC 4627) that serves as an alternative to XML.
.
The primary purpose of this module is to select an appropriate backend JSON
implementation. It prefers either JSON::XS (see libjson-xs-perl) or JSON::PP
(see libjson-pp-perl), but will fall back on a backport implementation if
neither are available.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libjson-perl because module for manipulating JSON-formatted data.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libjson-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libjson-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libjson-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
